creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
I made a little mistake, please apply the patch below.

--- a/Makefile	2010-08-19 11:03:14.000000000 +0200
+++ b/Makefile	2010-08-19 11:02:34.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # Date created:				13 Mar 2010
 # Whom:					markand
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/games/viruskiller $
+# $FreeBSD: $
 #

 PORTNAME=	viruskiller
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@

 USE_SDL=	mixer image ttf
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
-INSTALL_ICONS=	yes
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes

 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}

-- 
Demelier David
